title: Public-Private Articulation: Chambers' Role in Policymaking | Regulation Day Devconnect Edition
description:
This panel brings together Diego Díaz (Head of Payments & Crypto, Cámara Argentina Fintech), Martín Benítez Aramendia (Board Member, Cámara Uruguaya Fintech), Ricardo Prieto Sosa (Board Member, Cámara Paraguaya de Blockchain), and Vyara Savova (Senior Policy Lead, European Crypto Initiative), moderated by Paula Pascual Cortes (Founder & CEO, Merge). The discussion examines the role of industry chambers in public–private articulation, regional coordination, and their contribution to the development of effective regulatory frameworks.

This conversation was part of Regulation Day – Devconnect Edition, held during Devconnect 2025 in Buenos Aires. Regulation Day convened policymakers, regulators, founders, builders, and industry leaders to foster open dialogue around regulation, innovation, and the future of decentralized technologies.

Crecimiento is a global movement working to position Argentina as a leading hub for crypto and emerging technologies. Through community-driven programs, education, and dialogue between the public and private sectors, Crecimiento supports builders, founders, and institutions shaping the future of the ecosystem.
